title: Kiln event payload model request rendered

model_invocation_id.description: Operation-local identity for the model invocation this rendered request belongs to.

render_id.description: Context render identity used to produce the model request.

model_configuration.description: Model configuration selected for the invocation.

request_kind.description: Logical kind of model request being rendered.

rendered_messages_count.description: Number of messages rendered into the model request.

rendered_tool_count.description: Number of tool definitions rendered into the model request.

rendered_token_estimate.description: Estimated number of input tokens in the rendered model request.

request_artifact_reference.description: Optional artifact reference for the rendered model request.

rendered_at.description: When the model request was rendered.
